creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
@vagadubai in Bluewaters is a hidden gem! 💎 

📍Located in The Wharf, next to Ain Dubai, VAGA is a beautiful and upscale Armenian restaurant.
🥘 Heritage Armenian dishes are infused with contemporary and Arabic twists. Expect fresh ingredients, delightful textures, and vibrant flavors! Don’t miss the the Lahmacun and Manti!
🍹It has a lounge and bar serving a variety of cocktails and drinks.
💰Approximate spend for 2: 500 AED

Save for your next fancy date night!
